source_pr.title: ddl: fix mix DDLs blocks 2*lease on unistore
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: close #18456 Do the test in #18456, this will block 90s(2*lease), and it means `OwnerCheckAllVersions` returns "context deadline exceeded". And this problem will happen on unistore, not on TiKV. Problem Summary: On unistore we use `MockSchemaSyncer`, we need to do `MockSchemaSyncer.OwnerCheckAllVersions` like [`schemaVersionSyncer.OwnerCheckAllVersions`](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/ddl/util/syncer.go#L397). ### Check List Tests - Local test Using the test in #18456. This case hard to test, because it only blocks 2*lease and the lease in the test only 200ms. Even if we add a test, it must be unstable. ### Release note -

symptoms: PR body: mixed DDLs on unistore can block 2*lease (context deadline exceeded) due to MockSchemaSyncer behavior.
failure_signature: PR body: mixed DDLs on unistore can block 2*lease (context deadline exceeded) due to MockSchemaSyncer behavior.
root_cause_explanation: On unistore, MockSchemaSyncer.OwnerCheckAllVersions waited for selfSchemaVersion to become exactly equal to latestVer. When schema versions advance quickly (e.g., mixed DDLs), selfSchemaVersion can jump past latestVer, causing the exact-equality wait loop to block until timeout (2*lease / context deadline exceeded). The fix relaxes the check to `ver >= latestVer` so newer versions satisfy the wait and avoid unnecessary blocking.
fix_pattern: Relax the MockSchemaSyncer OwnerCheckAllVersions condition from `== latestVer` to `>= latestVer` to avoid blocking when schema version advances past the expected value.

evidence: evidence: PR body: mixed DDLs on unistore can block 2*lease (context deadline exceeded) due to MockSchemaSyncer behavior.
evidence: MockSchemaSyncer.OwnerCheckAllVersions uses ver>=latestVer instead of ver==latestVer to avoid unnecessary blocking (ddl/mock.go).
